prompt: Run issue-to-spec for issue #88 in acme/platform. Issue: 'Add audit log exports filtered by actor and date range'. Comments include compliance constraints and a request to avoid implementation details in requirements.
assertions: Final response includes the exact issue identifier acme/platform#88.
When GitHub retrieval fails, final response includes the exact gh command attempted.
When GitHub retrieval fails, final response includes repository error text from gh.
When GitHub retrieval fails, final response does not claim planning-ready status.
